response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++), but the resume shows no substantive Java/Kotlin/JVM work, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, and no demonstrated interest in IDE internals or language tooling. Java appears only as a passing mention alongside DLang on robotics/orchestration projects over a decade ago. The role's core requirements (deep JVM, Spring ecosystem, IDE/language tooling) are largely unmet.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Brief C/C++ experience contributing to an IDE (LabWindows/CVI) at National Instruments
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing, open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise JVM framework experience
Java/Kotlin exposure is minimal and dated; primary stack is TS/Node and DLang
No evidence of IDE internals or language tooling work in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Lack of Spring/JVM enterprise framework experience
Minimal Java and no Kotlin experience
